dt-option.name: search
dt-option.description:
This feature displays a global search input next to a DataTable, letting the end user enter simple text search terms. The search behaviour can be customized with the `-init search` object.
The `-feature search` feature can be disabled completely using the `-init searching` option or by excluding it from the `-init layout` options (which is the preferred method as of DataTables 2).
Multiple instances of this feature can be used on a single table. The inputs will be kept in-sync when the columns used for search match (`-feature search.columns`) - i.e. a value from one will propagate to another - this can be useful if you wish to display a search input both at the top and the bottom of a table.

example.title: Disable search input with default layout
